{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: Description carries PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE, and concrete file:line evidence (cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:2104-2113, execute_bead.go:2137-2148, lefthook.yml:205-216, .git/hooks/pre-commit:11-18) plus an explicit PROPOSED FIX and NON-SCOPE. Acceptance is two numbered, testable criteria naming specific Test* functions (TestExecuteBeadPrompt_UsesImplementationCommitAsSinglePreCommitGate, TestExecuteBeadImplementationCommit_RunsPreCommitOnceForUnchangedIndex) covering prompt-text behavior and hook-invocation-count behavior respectively — a competent agent can pick files and write both tests without asking. Parent (ddx-8a78ee90) and deps (cross-ref ddx-2afca9c9, ddx-03568f89, explicitly 'no implementation dependency') are stated. Labels carry phase/area/kind plus cross-refs and a 'decomposed' marker consistent with this being part 1 of 3. All five prior_attempts failed with 'session closed before Stop hook' / failure_class unknown — an infra/session-lifecycle issue, not a bead-content blocker, so it does not indicate the bead itself is unsafe or ambiguous to attempt again. Minor prose issues (duplicated PROPOSED FIX/NON-SCOPE blocks, missing the standard trailing 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ... green' and 'lefthook run pre-commit passes' AC lines) do not prevent execution as written.","fingerprint":"f881cc8377485429ecdc99ed8102373758ee3d74cc50cc11eb5d39e2899871db","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"system_unready","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.system_unready","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"f881cc8377485429ecdc99ed8102373758ee3d74cc50cc11eb5d39e2899871db"}
